sections.paragraph:
m. a chamber, 1Ki 14:28 Eze 40:7, seq. (Ch. תְּוַא, תְּוָן Syr. ܬܘܳܢܐܳ, ܬܘܰܘܳܢܐܳ.) Plur. תָּאִים, once תָּאֹות Eze 40:12, from the root תָּוָה No. III, to dwell. The form תָּא appears to spring from תָּו (for תָּוֶה), the letter ו being changed because of the preceding Kametz into Aleph, as קָוַם, קָאם, קָם.

I.
